font.geometry: Embedded 96-glyph Blender-extracted BlurMedium Regular outline atlas (ASCII plus em dash)

validation: The recovered Blurmed.ttf was loaded in Blender and its evaluated outline boundaries were extracted into the portable dump without publishing the commercial binary. The atlas now includes the em dash used by the browser's default text. Blender 5 leaves the legacy animated instances-to-Fill-Curve path empty, so the reference harness explicitly realizes the glyphs and materializes the frame-240 typed string. Blender and the browser both generate 4,743 vertices / 33 filled glyph faces with the same wrapping, cursor placement, and world bounds within 0.00001 units.
